meta.title: Learn to use OpenAI’s o1 model for advanced reasoning tasks in this new course
meta.description:
Enroll for free: https://bit.ly/3Dju1qW

Learn how to use OpenAI’s o1 model to tackle advanced reasoning tasks like coding, planning, and image understanding in Reasoning with o1, a free course made in collaboration with OpenAI, and taught by Colin Jarvis, its Head of AI Solutions.

You’ll explore:

When and how to use the o1 model for tasks requiring advanced reasoning.
Effective prompting strategies, including meta-prompting, to optimize results.
Practical applications like coding, vision tasks, and building workflows that balance intelligence and cost.

Learn how o1’s unique features, such as chain-of-thought prompting and test-time compute, enable it to reason through complex problems by breaking them into manageable steps. With hands-on examples and guidance, this course equips you to build applications that rely on abstract and complex reasoning.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/3Dju1qW
